description: Telemetry schema, typed store/service APIs, redaction helpers, payload previews, retention stats, and pruning for Pibo debug telemetry.

userStories.title: Add telemetry record types and correlation model
userStories.description: As a runtime engineer, I want shared telemetry TypeScript types so that capture, store, and CLI code use the same correlated record shapes.
acceptanceCriteria: Add TypeScript types for telemetry turns, phases, provider requests, provider events, tool calls, payload previews, retention classes, and query results

Types include applicable correlation fields for piboSessionId, rootSessionId, roomId, turnId, phaseId, providerRequestId, upstreamResponseId, toolCallId, toolName, runId, eventStreamId, createdAt, and updatedAt
Types model status values for running, ok, error, aborted, timeout, open, and stale-equivalent query states where applicable
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add idempotent telemetry schema migration
userStories.description: As a storage maintainer, I want telemetry tables created additively so that existing Pibo stores keep working.
acceptanceCriteria: Add idempotent migrations for telemetry turns, phases, provider requests, provider event summaries, tool calls, and payload previews or an equivalent normalized schema
Add indexes for lookup by piboSessionId, turnId, providerRequestId, toolCallId, createdAt, updatedAt, and retention class where applicable
Running migrations twice succeeds without duplicate-column or duplicate-table failures
Existing debug/session/event store tests continue to pass
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement telemetry store write APIs
userStories.description: As runtime capture code, I want small store methods so that telemetry writes do not require raw SQL at capture sites.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement typed write/update APIs for starting/updating turns, phases, provider requests, provider event summaries, tool calls, and payload previews
Write APIs are safe to call repeatedly for the same logical id where upsert semantics are expected
Telemetry can be disabled or unavailable without crashing callers that use the service wrapper
Store contract tests cover insert, update, terminal status, and missing optional correlation ids
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement telemetry store read APIs for debug commands
userStories.description: As a CLI engineer, I want bounded telemetry queries so that debug commands can render summaries without scanning or dumping entire stores.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement read APIs for listing telemetry sessions, inspecting one session, reading a turn timeline, reading a provider request, listing provider events with cursor/limit, reading a tool call, listing stale work, and reading payload previews
List APIs enforce default limits and hard maximum limits
Provider event listing supports sequence or cursor-based paging
Read API tests cover unknown ids, empty stores, limits, cursors, and correlation lookup
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add centralized redaction helper for telemetry
userStories.description: As a security reviewer, I want one redaction helper so that headers, JSON, and text previews are scrubbed consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Redact sensitive keys case-insensitively including authorization, cookie, set-cookie, api_key, apiKey, token, access_token, refresh_token, client_secret, clientSecret, googleClientSecret, password, and secret
Redact common bearer token and API-key-like string patterns in text values
Redaction returns metadata indicating whether data was redacted and truncated
Unit tests cover nested JSON objects, arrays, headers, text payloads, and conservative false-positive redaction
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement bounded payload preview persistence
userStories.description: As an operator, I want optional payload previews to be redacted and size-limited so that rare parser issues can be inspected safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Payload preview persistence requires an explicit capture mode or service option and defaults to summary-only behavior
Saved previews include owner kind, owner id, byte size, truncation flag, redaction flag, content type, preview text, createdAt, and payload_preview retention class
Preview text is capped by a default byte limit and a hard maximum limit
Tests prove disabled preview capture returns a clear unavailable result
Tests pass
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add telemetry retention stats and prune service
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want stats and dry-run pruning so that telemetry storage can be managed safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement telemetry stats grouped by retention class with row counts and byte counts where available
Implement prune dry-run that reports rows and bytes that would be deleted for a retention class and cutoff
Implement explicit prune apply that deletes only matching telemetry rows and does not affect sessions, transcripts, or normalized event logs
Tests cover dry-run, apply, cutoff filtering, retention class filtering, and unrelated data preservation
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
